summary: Iteration 45 - Tested 6 new features for SaaS TRANSFORM. All backend tests (12/12) passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

GET /api/members (is_coach field).details: All members have is_coach boolean field. 110 coaches detected (THE COACH, VIRTUAL COACH memberships)

PUT /api/transactions/{id}.details: Successfully edits amount, description, client_name. Returns 404 for nonexistent transactions. KPIs auto-recalculated

Members categories.details: 326 total members: 110 coaches, 105 active non-coaches, 111 expired non-coaches

Transactions client_name.details: Transactions have client_name field populated from CSV import

members_clickable_stat_cards.details: 5 stat cards (Membres Actifs, Coachs, Expirés/Churn, Expirant 30j, Tous) are clickable and filter the list

members_coach_badge.details: 110 COACH badges displayed in blue in Coaches tab

members_expired_badge.details: 112 expired badges (EXPIRÉ) shown in red with row opacity reduced

members_active_excludes_coaches.details: Active tab shows 105 members with 0 COACH badges - correctly excludes coaches

transactions_client_column.details: Client column visible with clickable links. Clicking navigates to /members?search=clientName

transactions_edit_button.details: Edit button (pencil icon) opens modal with fields: Date, Amount, Client, Description, Category, Payment method, Notes

transactions_category_filter.details: Category filter button opens dropdown with collapsible groups: Revenus (25), Dépenses (13)

transactions_search_client.details: Search filters by description, category AND client_name

features_verified: 1. GET /api/members returns is_coach field (true for THE COACH/VIRTUAL COACH memberships)
2. PUT /api/transactions/{id} edits transactions with auto KPI recalculation
3. MembersPage - 5 stat cards are clickable filters with active border highlighting
4. MembersPage - Coaches tab shows COACH badge in blue
5. MembersPage - Expired tab shows EXPIRÉ badge in red with opacity styling
6. MembersPage - Active tab excludes coaches (only shows non-coach active members)
7. TransactionsPage - Client column with ExternalLink icon linking to member profile
8. TransactionsPage - Edit button opens modal for editing date/amount/client/description/category
9. TransactionsPage - Category filter with collapsible Revenus/Dépenses groups
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: TableBody in MembersPage has children without unique 'key' prop - minor issue
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - tested existing imported data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested modifications verified working. Key findings: (1) is_coach field correctly identifies 110 coaches by membership type (THE COACH PASS, VIRTUAL COACH). (2) PUT /api/transactions/{id} allows editing transactions with auto KPI recalculation. (3) MembersPage has 5 clickable stat cards as filters with active border styling. (4) Coaches get blue COACH badge, expired members get red EXPIRÉ badge with reduced opacity. (5) Active members tab excludes coaches (shows only 105 non-coach active members). (6) TransactionsPage has Client column with links to /members?search=name, edit modal with all fields, category filter with Revenus/Dépenses groups. Data: 326 members (110 coaches, 216 non-coaches), 38 categories, ~3400 transactions.
